THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISICH, CLANTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH ST, #539, S,F, CA. $436.06 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $516.06, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS W/RIGHT OF POSS- ESSION.
